name: Kronen
description: The Kronen resurrects a lethal fighting style once thought lost to the ages.

A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.additions: Iron Wake is now home to a very special memorial to the late Tenno, Datareaper, located just behind Clem’s Fort. Datareaper created the character Clem and, with it, brought joy to many fellow Tenno. His memorial displays his favorite and most used Warframe, and his custom-colored Kronen Prime, as the Kronen was also his creation from a Contest long ago. Clem Forever <3.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes:
Kronen Prime
Kronen Prime
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.0.8 + 30.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee and Mirage Relics in the drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Kronen Prime
Kronen Prime

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed holster issues with the Kronen Prime on numerous Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with the Kronen Prime not behaving nicely in the Foundry and Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.changes:
Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics have replaced all locations of Zephyr Prime, Tiberon Prime, and Kronen Prime Relics:
*Zephyr Prime, Tiberon Prime, and Kronen Prime Relics are also still out in the wild, just not in exclusive spots like Bounties or Onslaught.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.5 + 22.16.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zephyr Prime, Tiberon Prime, and Kronen Prime (and their respective Relics) not having Codex entries. This resulted in the inability to Chat Link the items and their Relics if you did not own them.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kronen not displaying when searching ‘Tonfa’ in the Market/Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Kronen and Boltace damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with the Kronen and Silva & Aegis both not having a proper wall attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.additions: The Kronen resurrects a lethal fighting style once thought lost to the ages. The Kronen comes with an entirely new stance, GEMINI CROSS!
